## Your Question

Please describe what you are trying to understand or implement.

> 

---

## Your Context (optional but helpful)

Sharing a little context helps the community give you a more useful answer. You do not need to identify your organization.

- **Industry / sector**: 
- **Organization size**: 
- **AI tools or use cases involved**: 
- **Which section of the framework this relates to**: 

---

## What You Have Already Tried (optional)

Have you reviewed the Customization Questionnaire in Appendix A? Has anything in the framework already addressed part of your question?

> 

---

## Additional Detail (optional)

Any other context, constraints, or specifics that would help the community respond accurately.

> 

---

*This is a community-supported repository. Responses are provided on a best-effort basis by maintainers and contributors. This framework is general guidance — always consult qualified legal, HR, and infosec professionals before adopting policy in your organization.*
